'''Vantos Coll''' was a highly obese member of the [[Supreme Tribunal]], in league with [[Crispin Hoedaack]] and [[Darth Vader (The Star Wars)|Darth Vader]] as they plotted to take control of the [[New Galactic Empire]]. He cautioned Hoedaack, however, noting that the plan depended on the success in subduing the [[Aquilaean system]].

Coll was present during the [[Showdown on Coruscant|Jedi Rebellion]], and correctly remembered [[Luke Skywalker (The Star Wars)|Luke Skywalker]] as the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] leader, not [[Seig Darklighter]].
